title: buildah push fails with latest docker registry image
body:
I had buildah push working with buildah version 0.5 on F27 with a September version of the private docker registry that was run using buildah run.

i.e. 
shell 1)  buildah --debug run $registry 
shell 2) buildah push --tls-verify false fedora docker://localhost:5000/fedora:latest

However later: 
Updated my registry and both 0.5 and 0.8 failed:
[root@localhost whenry]# buildah -v
buildah version 0.8 (image-spec 1.0.0, runtime-spec 1.0.0)
[root@localhost whenry]# buildah push --tls-verify=false fedora docker://localhost:5000/whenry/fedora:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06
 0 B / 82.80 MiB [----------------------------------------------------------] 0s
error pushing image "fedora" to "docker://localhost:5000/whenry/fedora:latest": error copying layers and metadata: Error writing blob: Error initiating layer upload to /v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/uploads/, status 500
[root@localhost whenry]# /bin/buildah -v
buildah version 0.5 (image-spec 1.0.0, runtime-spec 1.0.0)
[root@localhost whenry]# /bin/buildah push --tls-verify=false fedora docker://localhost:5000/whenry/fedora:latest
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06
 0 B / 82.80 MiB [----------------------------------------------------------] 0s
error pushing image "fedora" to "docker://localhost:5000/whenry/fedora:latest": error copying layers and metadata: Error writing blob: Error initiating layer upload to /v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/uploads/, status 500

On the buildah --debug run registry I'm seeing a permission denied see below **bold**:
INFO[0650] response completed                            go.version=go1.7.6 http.request.host=localhost:5000 http.request.id=85deee9f-6097-4f84-9a41-e2f81a7930bf http.request.method=GET http.request.remoteaddr=[::1]:37928 http.request.uri=/v2/ http.request.useragent=Go-http-client/1.1 http.response.contenttype=application/json; charset=utf-8 http.response.duration=948.607µs http.response.status=200 http.response.written=2 instance.id=01b3a05b-ca0d-4517-ad41-5ba48a67659c version=v2.6.2
::1 - - [28/Nov/2017:17:45:15 +0000] "GET /v2/ HTTP/1.1" 200 2 "" "Go-http-client/1.1"
ERRO[0650] response completed with error                 err.code=blob unknown err.detail=sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 err.message=blob unknown to registry go.version=go1.7.6 http.request.host=localhost:5000 http.request.id=244fcbd9-e19f-40d2-9eb9-4bcdb37db1a7 http.request.method=HEAD http.request.remoteaddr=[::1]:37930 http.request.uri=/v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 http.request.useragent=Go-http-client/1.1 http.response.contenttype=application/json; charset=utf-8 http.response.duration=976.81µs http.response.status=404 http.response.written=157 instance.id=01b3a05b-ca0d-4517-ad41-5ba48a67659c vars.digest=sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 vars.name=whenry/fedora version=v2.6.2
::1 - - [28/Nov/2017:17:45:15 +0000] "HEAD /v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 HTTP/1.1" 404 157 "" "Go-http-client/1.1"
ERRO[0650] response completed with error                 err.code=blob unknown err.detail=sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 err.message=blob unknown to registry go.version=go1.7.6 http.request.host=localhost:5000 http.request.id=03ec562b-3f46-469d-ac7f-5d6af1beb62f http.request.method=HEAD http.request.remoteaddr=[::1]:37932 http.request.uri=/v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 http.request.useragent=Go-http-client/1.1 http.response.contenttype=application/json; charset=utf-8 http.response.duration=1.07094ms http.response.status=404 http.response.written=157 instance.id=01b3a05b-ca0d-4517-ad41-5ba48a67659c vars.digest=sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 vars.name=whenry/fedora version=v2.6.2
::1 - - [28/Nov/2017:17:45:15 +0000] "HEAD /v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/sha256:a8ee583972c2295bb76704d4defe5116d5e4dd7ba3767aaa2cc8fcf71088ee06 HTTP/1.1" 404 157 "" "Go-http-client/1.1"
**ERRO[0650] response completed with error                 err.code=unknown err.detail=filesystem: mkdir /var/lib/registry/docker: permission denied err.message=unknown error go.version=go1.7.6 http.request.host=localhost:5000 http.request.id=18f14a24-a37d-4b76-a10d-d2563ffcd881 http.request.method=POST http.request.remoteaddr=[::1]:37934** http.request.uri=/v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/uploads/ http.request.useragent=Go-http-client/1.1 http.response.contenttype=application/json; charset=utf-8 http.response.duration=1.472359ms http.response.status=500 http.response.written=164 instance.id=01b3a05b-ca0d-4517-ad41-5ba48a67659c vars.name=whenry/fedora version=v2.6.2
::1 - - [28/Nov/2017:17:45:15 +0000] "POST /v2/whenry/fedora/blobs/uploads/ HTTP/1.1" 500 164 "" "Go-http-client/1.1"
INFO[0720] PurgeUploads starting: olderThan=2017-11-21 17:46:24.96891125 +0000 UTC, actuallyDelete=true 
INFO[0720] Purge uploads finished.  Num deleted=0, num errors=1 
INFO[0720] Starting upload purge in 24h0m0s              go.version=go1.7.6 instance.id=01b3a05b-ca0d-4517-ad41

If I run the registry using docker (docker run -d -p 5000:5000 registry) then the push using buildah 0.8 runs fine.

comments.body:
More info using ausearch -m avc -ts today

Just the last of six attempt outputs:
----
time->Tue Nov 28 10:52:50 2017
type=AVC msg=audit(1511891570.475:274): avc:  denied  { create } for  pid=1328 comm="registry" name="docker" scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c657,c731 tcontext=system_u:object_r:container_var_lib_t:s0 tclass=dir permissive=0

After I did a restorecon -R -v /var/lib/containers and did another attempt I got this from ausearch -m avc

time->Tue Nov 28 11:43:56 2017
type=AVC msg=audit(1511894636.293:359): avc:  denied  { read } for  pid=2236 comm="registry" name="link" dev="dm-0" ino=162171 scontext=system_u:system_r:container_t:s0:c657,c731 tcontext=system_u:object_r:container_var_lib_t:s0 tclass=file permissive=0

FYI 
